## Checklist

### Gate 1 — Spec
- [ ] Linked issue has accepted acceptance criteria
- [ ] Spec was approved before this branch was created

### Gate 2 — Generation
- [ ] I read every Copilot suggestion before accepting
- [ ] Commits are small and logical (not one giant "implement feature" commit)
- [ ] Commit messages explain WHY, not just WHAT

### Gate 3 — Review readiness
- [ ] I commented `/ai-review` and addressed all 🔴 issues
- [ ] PR is under 400 lines (excluding lock files, snapshots, generated files)
- [ ] Tests are included in this PR (not "I'll add them later")

### Gate 4 — CI
- [ ] All CI checks pass locally (`npm run lint && npm test`)
